questions.question: 1 (a) A list of symbols and formulae is shown. Al 2 O 3 C 2 H 5 OH CO 2 Fe 2 O 3 H 2 He K + Li + N 2 Na + O 2– Answer the following questions using these symbols or formulae. Each symbol or formula may be used once, more than once or not at all. State which symbol or formula represents: (i) an element that is monoatomic .........................................................

questions.question: 6 (a) The structures of four organic compounds, B, C, D and E, are shown. HHC H H C H H C H H HHC H H C H H O H H C H C O O H CC H H H H C H H BC DE (i) State which compound, B, C, D or E, dissolves in water to form an acidic solution. ....................................................................................................................................... [1] (ii)
